items.name: Alchemy Book 1
items.description: Primary book that upgrades an item's upper limit.

items.name: Alchemy Book 2
items.description: A junior book that upgrades an item's upper limit when putting it into the furnace. After finishing compounding it will disappear. Can be traded.

items.name: Alchemy Book 3
items.description: A senior book that upgrades an item's upper limit when putting it into the furnace. Disappear after finishing compounding. Can be traded.

items.name: Alchemy Book 4
items.description: A super book that upgrades an item's upper limit.
